faqData.question: Can I bring a plus one?
faqData.answer: No, we are unable to accommodate additional guests. To keep our celebration intimate and simple, we kindly ask that guests attend as indicated on their invitation. We truly appreciate your understanding and can't wait to celebrate with you.

faqData.question: What to wear?
faqData.answer: Our dress code is Burgundy Red Wine or a shade close to that color. We'd love our guests to dress in smart casual or semi-formal attire in this palette. Please avoid wearing white so the bride can shine.

faqData.question: Where's the reception?
faqData.answer: Purok Mondalo Barangay Unidad Training Center, Cagwait Surigao del Sur
